column1: # senseflow-eink-node partition table — dual-slot OTA + rollback
# Ported from careflow-modbus-node (rak3112-rs485-node). nvs kept at the default 0x9000/0x6000 so
# provisioning ('prov') + LoRaWAN nonces ('lorawan') survive a layout/OTA change (no full erase).
# App slots are 3 MB each (app well under that).
